name: hoc/filter-builder
description: A visual query-builder HOC that lets users construct complex filters by adding rule rows, choosing fields, operators, and values, and grouping conditions with AND/OR logic. Provides FilterBuilder, FilterBuilderGroup, FilterBuilderRule, FilterBuilderField, FilterBuilderOperator, and FilterBuilderValue sub-components. Supports nested groups, validation, and i18n labels. Composed of Select, Input, Button, and Card primitives with full ConfigProvider locale support.
useCases: Advanced search panels in CRM and ERP systems for multi-field lead or contact filtering
Log-analysis dashboards where users stack severity, source, timestamp, and message rules
E-commerce admin order grids with nested filters for status, date-range, and customer tier
Data-science workbenches building dataset queries without writing raw SQL or query DSL
usage: import { FilterBuilder, type FilterBuilderProps, type FilterCondition } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/filter-builder"
